text_original: It is good but they should just put adds in it instead of making you wait for 2hr after you past the talking limit.
text_zh: 挺好的，但他们应该直接放广告，而不是在超过聊天限制后让你等2个小时。
reply_original: Thanks for the support! We understand waiting is annoying. High-quality AI has huge server costs, and ad revenue alone can't cover it yet. We are exploring more ways to offer free messages in the future. If you have more ideas, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for your patience!
reply_zh: 感谢您的支持！我们理解等待令人心烦。高质量的 AI 伴随着巨大的服务器成本，仅靠广告收入目前还无法覆盖。我们正在探索未来提供更多免费消息的方法。如果您有更多想法，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。感谢您的耐心等待！
